set.body: Verify a quiet paired-JMH baseline, add a cross-platform PlatformMath.fma abstraction (JVM Math.fma, Scala.js multiply-add), route dot/axpy/gemv/gemm/SYRK arithmetic through it where measured, add alpha=1/beta=0 GEMM assign handling, tile A^T A if evidence supports it, preserve JVM/JS numerical laws, and commit raw/error/allocation benchmark evidence. This is the prerequisite kernel lift for gale-qr-blocked-householder.
set.title: Add platform FMA and finish dense BLAS parity
